semantic_sweep.review_note: Reviewed the complete chapter, all ten exact source mappings, twelve proof targets, fifty-four Lean declarations, bounded report imports and transitions, every manifest atom, and every prose candidate. Made the Implementation-Reference Evidence Packet the distinct owner; expanded 18/12/18/18; preserved narrow non-core transitions and zero chapter-core effect; and froze the clean-room natural-workload reproduction and transfer campaign.

scope.population: Exact Project Theseus source projects, pinned revisions, report families, commands, environments, artifacts, lineage, evidence states, replays, permissions, reviewers, consumers, dependencies, and times.
scope.environment: Ten mappings; twelve proof targets; fifty-four finite Lean declarations; one crosswalk fixture; static gate and generation imports; narrow report-bundle, task, support, retention, module, registry, pointer, board, trace, parity, and currentness imports. No clean live whole-project replay, current runtime proof, model-quality or capability result, independent reproduction, or transfer.
scope.model: Implementation-Reference Evidence Packet over exact artifact identity, evidence state, replay, public safety, reporting comparators, adjudication, correction, monitoring, and expiry.
scope.authority: Owns implementation-reference packet truth only; Project Theseus runtime, source artifacts, human intent, work ownership, evidence transition, capability, deployment, release, rights, and publication authorities remain separate.
scope.time: Reviewed through 2026-07-15; material source, revision, report, generator, command, environment, dependency, permission, reviewer, consumer, threat, or time changes expire affected packets.
scope.artifact: Chapter, manifest, ten mappings, report fixtures and imports, validators, twelve targets, fifty-four declarations, semantic review, and future campaign.

assumptions: Source revisions, reports, commands, environments, dependencies, permissions, artifacts, and reviewer decisions can be identified and retained.
Public-safe packets can expose enough lineage for independent replay without disclosing private payloads.
Natural workloads and matched baselines can use actual models, routing, tools, compute, and operator paths.
Independent implementers, operators, artifact reviewers, evaluators, institutions, infrastructures, and transfer sites can reproduce outcomes.
chapter_defaults.strongest_counterclaim: Report packets are documentation overhead that can preserve polished but stale or false records without uniquely improving reproducibility, capability evaluation, safety, governance, or usefulness.
chapter_defaults.falsifier: Clean-room natural-workload campaigns show that packets do not improve artifact truth, replay, overclaim rejection, correction, or recovery, impose unacceptable burden, leak private material, or cannot reproduce and transfer.

required_lanes.necessity: Freeze pinned Project Theseus sources and external reporting comparators without importing results.
Justify publication permission, public/private boundaries, reviewer authority, corrections, and terminal decisions.
Specify finite record and overclaim boundaries without claiming empirical system behavior.
Run clean-room commands, natural workloads, models, routes, tools, failures, rollback, and correction.
Measure useful throughput, quality, false promotion and blocking, currentness, leakage, failures, latency, burden, recovery, residuals, and cost.
Ablate digests, environment locks, states, public-safety boundaries, gates, negative retention, and correction propagation.
Reproduce across implementers, models, tasks, institutions, infrastructures, legal regimes, environments, and time.

contrary_evidence: Most packet evidence is sanitized, static, historical, metadata-only, or repository-local.
The support replay reruns ASI-side validators rather than Project Theseus as a whole.
The work-board import is explicitly stale and pointer records do not prove referenced artifact truth.
Several narrow non-core imports are prototype-backed, but none establishes chapter-core support.
All fifty-four declarations reduce finite hand-authored records or imported fixture summaries.
known_confounds: Private artifacts, hidden dependencies, dirty checkouts, unavailable services, or unrecorded environment state can defeat replay.
Shared authors, reviewers, tools, models, data, generators, and organizations can create false independence.
Sanitization can remove details required to reproduce or falsify the source result.
Outcome-aware packet design, selection, stopping, baselines, attacks, and missing failures can bias conclusions.
acceptance_criteria: Bind exact project, revision, report, command, environment, dependency, artifact digest, state, permission, reviewer, decision, residual, consumer, time, and non-claim.
Run clean-room natural workloads with matched baselines and retain all failures, missing artifacts, costs, and public-safety boundaries.
Demonstrate correction, downgrade, revocation, expiry, and rollback propagation across every packet consumer.
Promotion survives causal ablation, independent artifact review, reproduction, and heterogeneous transfer.
narrowing_criteria: Narrow every result to exact source revision, packet, command, environment, artifact, model, task, evaluator, institution, permission, and time.
Separate source note, static import, replay readiness, failed replay, local reproduction, independent reproduction, transfer, deployment, and SOTA states.
Unknown currentness, artifact truth, privacy, causality, evaluation, cost, reproduction, or transfer remains blocked.
refutation_criteria: Refute packet facts with digest mismatch, wrong revision, stale state, missing command or dependency, unauthorized payload, failed replay, or contradictory canonical artifact.
Refute benefit when matched baselines reproduce and govern equally well or packet burden, leakage, selection, weak attacks, or hidden failures explain results.
Refute current runtime, capability, safety, deployment, transfer, AGI, ASI, or SOTA from reports, fixtures, validators, or finite proofs alone.
deprecation_criteria: Deprecate only after every packet, artifact, report state, permission, correction, residual, decision, consumer, and result migrates with lineage.

reproduction.command: python3 scripts/validate_theseus_report.py && python3 scripts/validate_theseus_generation_mode_import.py && python3 scripts/validate_theseus_report_bundle_audit.py && python3 scripts/validate_theseus_concrete_evidence_surface.py && python3 scripts/validate_theseus_pretraining_readiness_currentness_import.py && cd lean && lake build AsiStackProofs.TheseusReference
reproduction.environment_lock: Repository-local public-safe fixtures and bounded imports current through 2026-07-15; clean live whole-project campaign not run.
reproduction.evaluator_identity: Repository-local; independent implementers, operators, artifact reviewers, evaluators, institutions, infrastructures, and transfer sites required.

residual.next_unblocking_condition: Publish a permissioned pinned public-safe bundle and run clean-room natural workloads with actual models, routes, tools, current state, matched baselines, failures, cost, correction, independent review, reproduction, and transfer.

non_claims: No report, GREEN gate, complete registry, pointer, board snapshot, parity manifest, validator, fixture, or theorem establishes current runtime truth, model quality, capability, safety, deployment, transfer, AGI, ASI, or SOTA.
No clean live whole-project replay, current work-board or runtime proof, independent reproduction, or transfer exists.
Narrow non-core prototype-backed imports do not promote the chapter core.

project-theseus-as-report-first-implemen.strongest_counterclaim: Report packets can be polished stale documentation without unique operational or evidential value.
project-theseus-as-report-first-implemen.falsifier: Clean-room matched campaigns show no benefit, unacceptable burden or leakage, failed correction, or no reproduction and transfer.
